scripts.poststart: sort -u output.nt | n3-transform -i turtle -p src/prefixes.json > output.ttl
scripts.subsets: npm run subset:classes-ap && npm run subset:predicates-ap
scripts.subset:classes-ap: comunica-sparql-file output.ttl -f queries/get-all-used-classes.construct.rq | n3-transform -i turtle -p src/prefixes.json > classes-ap.ttl
scripts.subset:predicates-ap: comunica-sparql-file output.ttl -f queries/get-all-used-predicates.construct.rq | n3-transform -i turtle -p src/prefixes.json > predicates-ap.ttl
